playArea.value: A highly configurable three-part experimental setup includes a particle source emitter, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When experiment is running, particles pass through available slits in barrier to land on detector screen and build patterns. You can choose and adjust source particles, configure slits in barrier, observe and take snapshots of resulting patterns on detector screen.

playAreaHighIntensity.value: A zoomed-in wave area shows a particle source, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When the source is on, waves travel through available slits and build a pattern on the detector screen. You can change particle type, slit configuration, wave display, detector view, and measurement tools.

playAreaSingleParticles.value: A zoomed-in wave area shows a single-particle source, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When the source is on, individual particles travel through available slits and build a hits pattern on the detector screen. You can change particle type, slit configuration, wave display, detector view, and measurement tools.

controlArea.value: Measurement tools can be added or removed to assist with data collection and analysis. Reset sim to start over.

maxHitsReachedHint.value: Clear detector screen to make more observations.

currentDetails.value:
Currently, { $isPlaying ->
  [false] sim is paused. { $isMaxHitsReached ->
    [true] Source is off. Max number of { $sourceType ->
      [photons] photon
      [electrons] electron
      [neutrons] neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
    } hits reached. Detector screen shows hits pattern.
   *[false] { $isEmitting ->
      [true] Source emits { $sourceType ->
        [photons] photons
        [electrons] electrons
        [neutrons] neutrons
      *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
      } directly at double-slit barrier with { $slitSetting ->
        [bothOpen] both slits open
        [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] top slit covered
         *[leftRight] left slit covered
        }
        [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] bottom slit covered
         *[leftRight] right slit covered
        }
        [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on top slit
         *[leftRight] detector on left slit
        }
        [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on bottom slit
         *[leftRight] detector on right slit
        }
        [noBarrier] no barrier
       *[bothDetectors] detectors on both slits
      }. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] { $hasHits ->
          [true] Detector screen shows intensity pattern.
         *[false] Detector screen is empty.
        }
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen has no hits.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
     *[false] Source is off. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] Detector screen is empty.
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen is empty.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
    }
  }
 *[true] { $isMaxHitsReached ->
    [true] source is off. Max number of { $sourceType ->
      [photons] photon
      [electrons] electron
      [neutrons] neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
    } hits reached. Detector screen shows hits pattern.
   *[false] { $isEmitting ->
      [true] source emits { $sourceType ->
        [photons] photons
        [electrons] electrons
        [neutrons] neutrons
      *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
      } directly at double-slit barrier with { $slitSetting ->
        [bothOpen] both slits open
        [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] top slit covered
         *[leftRight] left slit covered
        }
        [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] bottom slit covered
         *[leftRight] right slit covered
        }
        [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on top slit
         *[leftRight] detector on left slit
        }
        [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on bottom slit
         *[leftRight] detector on right slit
        }
        [noBarrier] no barrier
       *[bothDetectors] detectors on both slits
      }. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] { $hasHits ->
          [true] Detector screen shows intensity pattern.
         *[false] Detector screen is empty.
        }
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen has no hits.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
     *[false] source is off. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] Detector screen is empty.
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen is empty.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

interactionHint.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] Adjust source or slits and watch for changes on detector screen.
 *[false] Turn on { $sourceType ->
    [photons] photon
    [electrons] electron
    [neutrons] neutron
   *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
  } source and observe detector screen.
}

overview.value:
Currently, { $isPlaying ->
  [false] sim is paused.
 *[true] sim is running.
} { $sourceType ->
  [photons] photons
  [electrons] electrons
  [neutrons] neutrons
 *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
} { $isEmitting ->
  [true] are being emitted
 *[false] are not being emitted
}. { $displayMode ->
  [graph] The graph is shown
 *[screen] The detector screen is shown
} in { $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Average Intensity mode.
 *[hits] Hits mode.
}

sourceStatus.value:
Source is { $isEmitting ->
  [true] on
 *[false] off
}. Time is { $isPlaying ->
  [true] running
 *[false] paused
} at { $timeSpeed } speed.

 *[true] { $waveDisplayMode ->

        [violet] violet
        [blue] blue
        [indigo] indigo
        [green] green
        [yellow] yellow
        [orange] orange

     *[electrons] gray
      [neutrons] gray
      [heliumAtoms] gray

      [noBarrier] the detector screen.
     *[bothOpen] slitted barrier.
      [leftCovered] slitted barrier.
      [rightCovered] slitted barrier.
      [leftDetector] slitted barrier.
      [rightDetector] slitted barrier.
      [bothDetectors] slitted barrier.
    }
    [magnitude] Solid { $sourceType ->

        [green] green
        [yellow] yellow

      [heliumAtoms] gray

      [noBarrier] the detector screen.
     *[bothOpen] slitted barrier.
      [leftCovered] slitted barrier.
      [rightCovered] slitted barrier.
      [leftDetector] slitted barrier.
      [rightDetector] slitted barrier.
      [bothDetectors] slitted barrier.
    }
   *[electricField] { $sourceType ->

    } plane wave fronts move toward { $slitSetting ->

      [rightCovered] slitted barrier.
      [leftDetector] slitted barrier.
      [rightDetector] slitted barrier.
      [bothDetectors] slitted barrier.
    } { $wavefrontSpacing ->
      [extremelyFarApart] Wave peaks, extremely far apart.
      [veryFarApart] Wave peaks, very far apart.
      [farApart] Wave peaks, far apart.
      [somewhatCloseTogether] Wave peaks, somewhat close together.
      [closeTogether] Wave peaks, close together.
      [veryCloseTogether] Wave peaks, very close together.
     *[extremelyCloseTogether] Wave peaks, extremely close together.
    }
    [imaginaryPart] { $sourceType ->
      [photons] { $photonColor ->
        [violet] Violet
        [blue] Blue
        [indigo] Indigo
        [green] Green
        [yellow] Yellow
        [orange] Orange
       *[red] Red
      } and black
     *[electrons] Gray and black
      [neutrons] Gray and black
      [heliumAtoms] Gray and black
    } plane wave fronts move toward { $slitSetting ->
      [noBarrier] the detector screen.
     *[bothOpen] slitted barrier.
      [leftCovered] slitted barrier.
      [rightCovered] slitted barrier.
      [leftDetector] slitted barrier.
      [rightDetector] slitted barrier.
      [bothDetectors] slitted barrier.
    } { $wavefrontSpacing ->

photonDetail.value: Photon wavelength is { $wavelength } nanometers, in the { $color } zone.

particleDetail.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [electrons] Electron
  [neutrons] Neutron
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
} speed is { $speed } meters per second. Effective matter wavelength is about { $wavelength } picometers.

slits.value:
{ $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] Both slits are open. Slit separation is { $separation }.
  [leftCovered] Top slit is covered. Wave fronts emerge from bottom slit only.
  [rightCovered] Bottom slit is covered. Wave fronts emerge from top slit only.
  [leftDetector] Top slit has a detector.
  [rightDetector] Bottom slit has a detector.
  [noBarrier] No barrier is between source and detector screen.
 *[bothDetectors] Both slits have detectors.
}

detectorPattern.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [false] Source is off, so there is no pattern on the detector.
 *[true] { $detectionMode ->
    [averageIntensity] { $patternFormation ->
      [empty] No pattern has reached the detector screen yet.
      [forming] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Equally-spaced bright bands forming across detector screen.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] { $slitSetting ->
          [leftCovered] Wide central bright area forming on lower part of detector screen.
         *[rightCovered] Wide central bright area forming on upper part of detector screen.
        }
        [whichPathDiffraction] Wide central bright area forming on detector screen.
       *[noBarrier] Solid wave forms uniform glow across detector screen.
      }
      [complete] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Evenly-spaced bright bands, { $bandSpacing ->
          [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
          [veryFarApart] very far apart
          [farApart] far apart
          [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
          [closeTogether] close together
          [veryCloseTogether] very close together
         *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
        }, with brightest at center form a stable pattern on detector screen.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] { $slitSetting ->
          [leftCovered] Wide central bright area, brightest at center and fading toward the edges,
          forms a stable pattern on lower part of detector screen.
         *[rightCovered] Wide central bright area, brightest at center and fading toward the edges,
          forms a stable pattern on upper part of detector screen.
        }
        [whichPathDiffraction] Wide central bright area, brightest at center and fading toward the edges,
        forms a stable pattern on detector screen.
       *[noBarrier] Solid wave forms uniform glow across detector screen.
      }
      [paused] Detector pattern formation is paused.
      [notApplicable] Detector pattern does not apply to the current setup.
     *[collectingHits] Detector pattern is collecting hits.
    }
   *[hits] { $hitStage ->
      [none] Detector screen is empty. No particles have arrived yet.
      [few] Individual scattered hits appear. Total hits: { $hitCount }.
      [emerging] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Hits begin forming faint bands.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Bright-band pattern is absent.
        [whichPathDiffraction] Bright bands are gone.
       *[noBarrier] Evenly scattered hits appear across the detector screen.
      } Total hits: { $hitCount }.
      [developing] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Hits form evenly spaced bands.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Bright-band pattern is absent.
        [whichPathDiffraction] Bright bands are gone.
       *[noBarrier] Evenly scattered hits collect across the detector screen.
      } Total hits: { $hitCount }.
     *[clear] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Hits form evenly spaced bands.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Bright-band pattern is absent.
        [whichPathDiffraction] Bright bands are gone.
       *[noBarrier] Evenly scattered hits collect across the detector screen.
      } Total hits: { $hitCount }.
    }
  }
}

waveProgress.value:
{ $waveProgressStage ->
  [sourceOff] Source is off, so no wave is traveling.
  [travelingToSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave moves toward slitted barrier.
    [magnitude] Solid wave moves toward slitted barrier.
   *[electricField] Plane wave fronts move toward slitted barrier.
    [realPart] Plane wave fronts move toward slitted barrier.
    [imaginaryPart] Plane wave fronts move toward slitted barrier.
  }
  [atSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Solid waves emerge from each open slit and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Solid wave emerges from the open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, solid waves emerge from each slit one at a time
      and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
    }
    [magnitude] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Solid waves emerge from each open slit and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Solid wave emerges from the open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, solid waves emerge from each slit one at a time
      and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
    }
   *[electricField] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Circular wave fronts emerge from each open slit and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Circular wave fronts emerge from the open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from each slit
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
    [realPart] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Circular wave fronts emerge from each open slit and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Circular wave fronts emerge from the open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from each slit
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
    [imaginaryPart] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Circular wave fronts emerge from each open slit and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Circular wave fronts emerge from the open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from each slit
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
  }
  [interferingAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Fan-shaped ray pattern forms as overlapping solid waves add and cancel.
    [magnitude] Fan-shaped ray pattern forms as overlapping solid waves add and cancel.
   *[electricField] Fan-shaped checkered pattern forms as overlapping wave fronts add and cancel.
    [realPart] Fan-shaped checkered pattern forms as overlapping wave fronts add and cancel.
    [imaginaryPart] Fan-shaped checkered pattern forms as overlapping wave fronts add and cancel.
  }
  [diffractingAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave spreads and moves toward detector screen.
    [magnitude] Solid wave spreads and moves toward detector screen.
   *[electricField] Circular wave fronts spread and move toward detector screen.
    [realPart] Circular wave fronts spread and move toward detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Circular wave fronts spread and move toward detector screen.
  }
  [whichPathAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Non-interacting solid waves spread toward detector screen one at a time.
    [magnitude] Non-interacting solid waves spread toward detector screen one at a time.
   *[electricField] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen one at a time.
    [realPart] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen one at a time.
    [imaginaryPart] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen one at a time.
  }
  [directToScreen] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
    [magnitude] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
   *[electricField] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    [realPart] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
  }
 *[hittingScreen] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave has reached the detector screen.
    [magnitude] Solid wave has reached the detector screen.
   *[electricField] Wave fronts have reached the detector screen.
    [realPart] Wave fronts have reached the detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Wave fronts have reached the detector screen.
  }
}

displayTools.value:
{ $displayMode ->
  [graph] Graph view is active
 *[screen] Detector screen view is active
}. Wave display mode is { $waveDisplayMode ->
  [electricField] Electric Field
  [timeAveragedIntensity] Amplitude
  [realPart] Real Part
  [imaginaryPart] Imaginary Part
 *[magnitude] Amplitude
}. Screen brightness is { $brightness } percent. Stored snapshots: { $snapshotCount }. Tools shown: { $tapeMeasure ->
  [true] tape measure
 *[false] no tape measure
}, { $stopwatch ->
  [true] stopwatch
 *[false] no stopwatch
}, { $timePlot ->
  [true] time plot
 *[false] no time plot
}, { $positionPlot ->
  [true] position plot.
 *[false] no position plot.
}

sourceStopped.value:
Source stopped. Wave display clears. { $detectionMode ->
  [hits] Hits remain.
 *[averageIntensity] Intensity pattern cleared.
}

detectionModeChanged.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Average Intensity selected. The predicted pattern is shown continuously.
 *[hits] Hits selected. Individual particle impacts build the pattern statistically.
}

slitConfigurationChanged.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] { $sourceRestartedResponse }
 *[false] { $slitSetting ->
    [bothOpen] In barrier, both slits open.
    [leftCovered] In barrier, top slit covered.
    [rightCovered] In barrier, bottom slit covered.
    [leftDetector] Detector added to top slit in barrier.
    [rightDetector] Detector added to bottom slit in barrier.
    [noBarrier] Barrier removed from experiment.
   *[bothDetectors] Detectors added to both slits in barrier.
  }
}

waveDisplayChanged.value:
Wave display changed to { $waveDisplayMode ->
  [electricField] Electric Field.
  [timeAveragedIntensity] Amplitude.
  [realPart] Real Part.
  [imaginaryPart] Imaginary Part.
 *[magnitude] Amplitude.
}

toolChanged.value:
{ $tool ->
  [tapeMeasure] Tape measure
  [stopwatch] Stopwatch
  [timePlot] Time plot
 *[positionPlot] Position plot
} { $isVisible ->
  [true] shown.
 *[false] hidden.
}

hitStageChanged.value:
Hits pattern is now { $hitStage ->
  [none] empty.
  [few] showing individual scattered hits.
  [emerging] { $patternKind ->
    [noBarrier] showing evenly scattered hits.
   *[doubleSlitInterference] forming faint bands.
    [singleSlitDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
    [whichPathDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
  }
  [developing] { $patternKind ->
    [noBarrier] showing evenly scattered hits.
   *[doubleSlitInterference] forming evenly spaced bands.
    [singleSlitDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
    [whichPathDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
  }
 *[clear] { $patternKind ->
    [noBarrier] showing evenly scattered hits.
   *[doubleSlitInterference] showing evenly spaced bands.
    [singleSlitDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
    [whichPathDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
  }
}

waveProgressChanged.value:
{ $waveProgressStage ->
  [sourceOff] Source is off, so no wave is traveling.
  [atSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Solid waves emerge from each open slit and overlap.

      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.

    [imaginaryPart] { $patternKind ->

      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from each slit
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
  }
  [interferingAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Fan-shaped ray pattern forms as overlapping solid waves add and cancel.
    [magnitude] Fan-shaped ray pattern forms as overlapping solid waves add and cancel.
   *[electricField] Fan-shaped checkered pattern forms as overlapping wave fronts add and cancel.
    [realPart] Fan-shaped checkered pattern forms as overlapping wave fronts add and cancel.
    [imaginaryPart] Fan-shaped checkered pattern forms as overlapping wave fronts add and cancel.
  }
  [diffractingAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave spreads and moves toward detector screen.
    [magnitude] Solid wave spreads and moves toward detector screen.
   *[electricField] Circular wave fronts spread and move toward detector screen.
    [realPart] Circular wave fronts spread and move toward detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Circular wave fronts spread and move toward detector screen.
  }
  [whichPathAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Non-interacting solid waves spread toward detector screen one at a time.
    [magnitude] Non-interacting solid waves spread toward detector screen one at a time.
   *[electricField] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen one at a time.
    [realPart] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen one at a time.
    [imaginaryPart] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen one at a time.
  }
  [directToScreen] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
    [magnitude] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
   *[electricField] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    [realPart] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
  }
 *[hittingScreen] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [timeAveragedIntensity] Solid wave reached the detector screen.
    [magnitude] Solid wave reached the detector screen.
   *[electricField] Wave fronts reached the detector screen.
    [realPart] Wave fronts reached the detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Wave fronts reached the detector screen.
  }
}

maxHitsReached.value: Maximum number of hits reached. Source is off. Clear detector screen to make more observations.

reset.value: Experiment reset. Source is off and detector screen is empty.

sourceEmitter.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [photons] Photon Source Emitter
  [electrons] Electron Source Emitter
  [neutrons] Neutron Source Emitter
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium Atom Source Emitter
} { $isEmitting ->
  [true] on.
 *[false] off.
}

detectionMode.value:
Screen Detection set to { $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Intensity Mode.
 *[hits] Hits Mode.
}

slitConfiguration.value:
{ $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] Both slits open in barrier.
  [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
    [topBottom] Top slit covered in barrier.
   *[leftRight] Left slit covered in barrier.
  }
  [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
    [topBottom] Bottom slit covered in barrier.
   *[leftRight] Right slit covered in barrier.
  }
  [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
    [topBottom] Detector on top slit in barrier.
   *[leftRight] Detector on left slit in barrier.
  }
  [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
    [topBottom] Detector on bottom slit in barrier.
   *[leftRight] Detector on right slit in barrier.
  }
  [noBarrier] No barrier between source and screen.
 *[bothDetectors] Detectors on both slits in barrier.
}

accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value: Explore a graph of the detector screen pattern.

accessibleContextResponseExpanded.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Dynamic graph of intensity pattern shown.
 *[hits] Dynamic histogram of hits data shown.
}

accessibleContextResponseCollapsed.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Intensity graph hidden.
 *[hits] Hits histogram hidden.
}

intensityOff.value: The graph is empty. The source is off.

intensity.value: The graph traces intensity versus position with a tall central peak and smaller peaks on either side. { $spatialDescription }

intensitySingleSlit.value: The graph traces intensity versus position as a single broad peak centered on the graph, tapering smoothly toward the edges.

hitsNone.value: The histogram is empty. No particles have been counted yet.

hitsFew.value: A few bars have appeared at scattered positions across the histogram.

hitsEmerging.value: The histogram is growing. Some bars are becoming taller than others at repeated positions across the graph.

hitsDeveloping.value: Taller bars are appearing at regular intervals, with shorter bars between them. { $spatialDescription }

hitsClear.value: The histogram shows a tall central peak with repeating side peaks and lower bars between them. { $spatialDescription }

hitsSingleSlitEmerging.value: The histogram is growing, with taller bars near the center and shorter bars toward the edges.

hitsSingleSlitClear.value: The histogram shows a broad central peak that tapers toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

zoomInAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom in to see more detail of graph pattern.

zoomOutAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom out to see more of graph pattern.

accessibleContextResponse.value: Maximum number of hits reached. Source is off. Clear detector screen to make more observations.

intensity.value:
Evenly spaced bright bands form across the screen. Bands are { $spacing ->
  [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
  [veryFarApart] very far apart
  [farApart] far apart
  [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
  [closeTogether] close together
  [veryCloseTogether] very close together
 *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
} across screen, { $envelope ->
  [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
  [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
 *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
}.

intensitySingleSlit.value: Bright-band pattern is absent. Detector screen shows a wide central bright area, brightest in the middle and fading toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

intensityNoBarrier.value: Plane wave fronts move directly to the detector screen. Uniform glow from plane wave fronts.

hitsNone.value: Detector screen is empty. No particles have arrived yet.

hitsFew.value: Individual scattered hits appear on the detector screen.

hitsEmerging.value: Hits begin forming faint bands on the detector screen.

hitsDeveloping.value:
Hits form evenly spaced bands on the detector screen. Bands are { $spacing ->
  [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
  [veryFarApart] very far apart
  [farApart] far apart
  [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
  [closeTogether] close together
  [veryCloseTogether] very close together
 *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
} across screen, { $envelope ->
  [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
  [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
 *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
}.

hitsClear.value:
Hits form evenly spaced bands across the detector screen. Bands are { $spacing ->
  [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
  [veryFarApart] very far apart
  [farApart] far apart
  [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
  [closeTogether] close together
  [veryCloseTogether] very close together
 *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
} across screen, { $envelope ->
  [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
  [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
 *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
}.

hitsSingleSlitEmerging.value: Bright-band pattern is absent. Hits collect in a broad region near the center of the screen, with fewer toward the edges.

hitsSingleSlitClear.value: Bright-band pattern is absent. Hits form a broad central area that tapers toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

hitsNoBarrier.value: Evenly scattered hits appear across the detector screen.

snapshotHitsNone.value:
Detector screen is empty. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
} No particles have arrived yet.

snapshotHitsFew.value:
A handful of particles are visible at scattered positions across the screen. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsEmerging.value:
More particles are appearing, and faint vertical stripes are becoming visible with gaps between them. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsSingleSlitEmerging.value:
More particles are appearing in a broad region near the center of the screen, with fewer toward the edges. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsNoBarrier.value:
Evenly scattered hits appear across the detector screen. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

}
